docket_entries.description: ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO CRC 3.50 - 3.63 AS TO PETITIONER TUBBS, RODNEY NAKIA
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME FILED BY PETITIONER TUBBS, RODNEY NAKIA HEARING SET FOR SEP-13-2007 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 218

HEARING ON APPLICANT/PETITIONER RODNEY TUBBS' WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT BEING UNABLE TO EXAMINE APPLICANT RULED ON THE APPLICATION SUBMITTED. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE APPLICANT'S INCOME IS ENOUGH TO PAY THE COMMON NECESSARIES OF LIFE AND COURT FEES AND COSTS. RODNEY NAKIA TUBBS HAS TEN DAYS TO PAY THE FILING FEES OR THE FILINGS WILL BE STRICKEN. ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF FEE SENT TO ALL PARTIES. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON, II; CLERK: DLOK; REPORTER: SUSAN LEE CSR #4280 (206)
APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68511.3 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PETITIONER TUBBS, RODNEY NAKIA
UNCONTESTED CALENDAR OF SEP-13-2007 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME OFF CALENDAR- NO APPEARANCE.
PETITION FOR CHANGE OF NAME FILED BY PETITIONER TUBBS, RODNEY NAKIA JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES, PROOF OF SERVICE HEARING SET FOR AUG-01-2007 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206
